response: I interviewed five participants and noticed onboarding confusion in the first two screens.
We shipped quickly, but we still need clearer success metrics for retention.
The prototype tested well, though people struggled to find account settings.
Users understood the main flow, but error messages felt unclear and too technical.
Remote interviews helped us include participants from different regions and contexts.
We should prioritize bug fixes before adding another feature to the roadmap.
A simpler navigation menu reduced task time during usability testing.
Consistent labels across pages improved comprehension and reduced hesitation.
